newly_diagnosed.description: Ilmahaygii dhow ayaa la ogaaday waxaana ka fiirsanayaa tallaabada xigta

on_waitlist.description: Waxaan sugnaa adeegyada daawaynta waxaana u baahan gargaar hadda

older_child.title: Ilmo Weyn
older_child.description: Ilmahaygii waa weynaaday waxaana la dagaallanaa caqabadaha cusub

track.title: Halkee aad ku jirtaa socdaalkaaga?
track.subtitle: Waxaan gaar u sameyn doonaa khibradaada xaaladaada ku salaysan

profile.title: Noogu sheeg ilmahaaga
profile.subtitle: Tani waxay na caawisaa in aan gaar u sameynno hawlaha maalinlaha

home.crisis: Ma u baahan tahay gargaar hadda?

skills.title: Dugsi Daryeel-nafsi
skills.subtitle: Baro xirfadaha si aad ugu taageerto ilmahaaga maalin kasta

navigator.title: Agabka
navigator.subtitle: Kheyraadka, xuquuqda iyo hagitaanka taageerada
navigator.no_resources: Wali wax kheyraad ah lagama hayo
navigator.disclaimer: Tani waa macluumaad guud oo keliya. Sharciyadu way kala duwan yihiin gobol ahaan. Wixii talo gaar ah, la tasho u doodaha waxbarashada gaarka ah ama qareen.

community.title: Bulshada
community.subtitle: La xidh waalidiinta fahamsan
community.no_posts: Weli ma jiraan wax qoraal ah
community.be_first: Noqo qofka ugu horreeya ee wax la wadaaga bulshada.

step1.title: Tallaabooyinka 1: Badbaadada horeba
step1.description: Hubi in ilmahaaga iyo dadka ku xeeran jirkooda nabdoon yihiin.

step2.title: Tallaabo 2: Yaree Culaysyada
step2.description: Hoos u dhig iftiinka haddii suurtogal ah. Yaree cod dhaadheer. Siiy ilmahaaga meel.

step3.title: Tallaabo 3: La xidh oo Sug
step3.description: Fadhi agtiisa heerka isaga. Hurricanku wuu dhammaanayaa.

assistant.title: Kaaliyaha AI
assistant.subtitle: Weydii su'aalo ku saabsan autismka, daawaynta, iyo xuquuqdaada
assistant.intro: Waxaan ka jawaabi karaa su'aalaha ku saabsan autismka, daawaynta, xuquuqda dugsiga, iyo in ka badan.
assistant.error: Waan ka xunahay, hadda dhib baa i kala kulmaya isku xidhka Fadlan isku day mar kale wax yar ka dib
assistant.prompt_1: Waa maxay calaamadaha hore ee autismka?

settings.title: Dejinta
settings.logout_alert_message: Tani waxay dib u dajin doontaa abka oo waxay ku noqon doontaa fuulid.
settings.clear_chat_alert_message: Tani waxay tirtiri doontaa dhammaan wada hadalka kaaliyaha AI
settings.clear_chat_done_message: Taariikhda wada sheekaysiga ayaa la tirtiri doonaa dib u bilaabashada soo socota.

post.title: Ku dhaji
post.not_found_detail: Boostada waxaa laga yaabaa in meesha laga saaray ama aan si ku meel gaar ah loo heli karin.
post.no_comments: Wali faallooyin ma jiraan. Bilow wada hadalka!
post.delete_message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto qoraalkan? Tan lama celin karo.
post.delete_comment_message: Ma hubtaa inaad doonayso inaad tirtirto faalladan?
